# GKTriangle

**Structure**

The definition of a triangle in the mesh, available with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMeshGraph/triangle(at:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
struct GKTriangle
```

## Initializers

- **init()**
- **init(points:)**

## Instance Properties

- **points**: A set of three points describing the triangle.

## Constants

- **GKMeshGraphTriangulationMode**: Options for how to place graph nodes when generating the graph, used by the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMeshGraph/triangulationMode] property.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Sendable
